string 2:
There you are! I've been waiting for you. I got some more
info from social media.

Apparently, there've been a few ghost sightings around here.
Promising, right?
Surely this calls for the two of us to investigate!
{next}That's why I'm here.
{next}Surely you know what I'm gonna ask for.
{end}Sorry! I just remembered something important!

I knew I could count on you! Nice to hear you're so
motivated!

Just what I thought you'd say. Don't worry. I got you
covered. Let's get investigating!

Oh. You can't investigate right now? Well, then, let me know
when that changes!

Finish your important business yet? Ready to start
investigating with me?
{next}Yeah. Sorry for the wait.
{end}Not yet.
Good. I've been waiting for this!
Okay. Just let me know when you're free!

Now, let's head over to the Community Forest. That's where
all the sightings took place.
Hey! You two! Stop right there!

I'm with public safety. If you're headed into the Community
Forest, I'd advise caution.

Ugh... Ever since that one time, the sight of a public
safety officer makes me wanna run.

You have nothing to fear from me. Not as long as you let me
do my job.

Th-That's not very reassuring... Um, why do you say you'd
advise caution?

I heard an odd cry while investigating the park the other
day, and wanted to check back.
Can you describe what it sounded like?

It wasn't a dog or a cat. If it were an ordinary animal
noise, I wouldn't be here.
So, you think it could have been...

Yes. It could've come from a type of creature we're after.
Tell me if you see anything odd.

In that case, I don't mind lending a hand, but you have to
let me use my camera, okay?

Well... I suppose I can allow that. Your footage could end
up being vital evidence.

I'll confiscate it if need be. Now, let me take you to where
I heard that cry.
This is where I heard that odd noise.
I don't hear anything out of the ordinary right now...
Shh!
Huh? What's wrong?!
Shh. Listen closely.
You hear that? Sounds like someone's saying "gill, gill..."

Oh, yeah... Now that you mention it, you're right. It's
faint, but I hear it, too!
Let's head toward that sound!
...Guil!

It... It's a monster! I don't believe it! I have to get this
on camera!
...Guil?
{next}Gil?
{next}Gil, gil.
{next}Giiil!
Guil? Guil!
Guil, guil! Guil, guil! Guil, guil, guil!
Guil! ♪
Guil! Guil, guil!
Uh... What do you think those "gil, gil" sounds mean?
Guil!

It's headed for the entrance to the sewers. We'd better go
after it.
Guiiiiil!
Look out! It's on the attack!
Guil...

Hm... Somehow, I get the impression that thing wasn't
actually up to no good...

Yeah. More like... it was bored and wanted to play. Even
now, it was just roughhousing.
Yes. That's how it seemed to me, too.
Guil...

Look! It's headed off somewhere again.
Should we follow it?

I think this time we can leave it be. It went deeper into
the sewers, not out of them.

Seems like it's trying to avoid the surface, so there's no
need for us to chase it down.

We should give it the space it needs and head back,
ourselves.

Well, that solves the mystery of that strange noise. Thank
you for your help.

I doubt that little guy will be causing any more trouble.
I'm glad this ended so well.

You're... not as scary as I thought you'd be. Maybe I was
wrong about public safety.

I think it's time we got out of here. Thank you both for
your help.

I'll escort you to the park entrance. Thanks again for
lending a hand.

There she goes... Funny. She was nothing like I thought. I
wish I asked more questions.

Although... Don't ask me why, but I have a funny feeling
we'll be seeing her again.

Anyway, I'd better be getting back. Oh, and don't worry.
I've got your reward right here.
See you again soon!
